basic_details.job_title: RRI Engineering Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The latest Raman Research Institute (RRI) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Engineering Trainee posts! Published under Advertisement No. 15/2026 on the official RRI website, this new recruitment drive offers 6 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the maximum age limit of 23 years and possessing a B.E./B.Tech. degree in Electronics, Electronics & Communication Engineering, or Computer Science with at least 70% marks or 7.5 CGPA can apply online for these vacancies. The online application process is currently active and will remain open until 30-06-2026. Find all details abo

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 23 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules for SC/ST/OBC and persons with disabilities.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech. degree in Electronics, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Computer Science, with at least 70% marks or 7.5 CGPA
qualification.details: B.E./B.Tech. degree in Electronics, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Computer Science, with at least 70% marks or 7.5 CGPA.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RRI Engineering Trainee Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RRI to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the RRI Engineering Trainee recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the RRI Engineering Trainee positions is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Engineering Trainee post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E./B.Tech. degree in Electronics, Electronics & Communication Engineering, or Computer Science, with a minimum of 70% marks or 7.5 CGPA.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Engineering Trainee position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Engineering Trainee post is 23 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Engineering Trainee post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for the Engineering Trainee position at the Raman Research Institute.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for RRI Engineering Trainee recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Engineering Trainee role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Engineering Trainee position will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Engineering Trainee post?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Engineering Trainee post will receive a stipend of Rs. 31,000 per month.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Engineering Trainee positions at Raman Research Institute are contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Raman Research Institute located?
faq.answer: Raman Research Institute is located in Bengaluru, Karnataka, with the pincode 560080.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the RRI Engineering Trainee recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official RRI website on or before the last date of application.
